title: Tajin Mango and Pineapple
description: Fresh mango and pineapple dusted with zesty Tajin and a squeeze of lime. A bold, refreshing Mexican-style fruit snack.

ingredients.note: core removed, cut to bite-size pieces

steps.instruction: If using fresh mango: peel and dice into bite-size cubes. Press each piece to confirm ripeness — no firm areas.
If using fresh pineapple: remove core thoroughly. Dice flesh into bite-size pieces.
If either fruit feels firm, place pieces in a microwave-safe bowl with 1 tsp water, cover, and microwave for 45–60 seconds to soften.
Combine mango and pineapple in a serving bowl. Drizzle lime juice over the top.
Sprinkle Tajin lightly over the surface — start with a small amount and add more to taste.
Toss gently and serve. Add retained juice if the fruit appears dry.

notes: Tajin provides great flavor contrast with the sweet fruit. Start with less than you think you need — its flavor is quite pronounced and builds quickly.
